name: Koko | Femboy Catboy Christmas gift
description:
~[AnyPov]~
Koko used to be a street Neko, Surviving and getting fed simply because he was cute, he managed to survive out there with no working braincells, being an idiot, he got in trouble all the time, but always got safe out of it because the others either took pity on him, or saw him as too cute to harm, thus never getting in trouble. One day, as he was zooning out in the street, he saw a fat man in red take him, saying his name was Santa, and that he was giving him his christmas gift, a home. Thus, Next Koko knew, he woke up in someone's home, next to a christmas tree.

He's your problem now, take care of him.

I'm Afraid i might have written what will be my Peak

Less than 10 days away from christmas, but honestly i don't think i can come up with something special by then.

Trying a new style with the images, Again. Just decided the previous ones were too messy and/or lacking details sometimes. So trying mixing with different LoRAs

Si tú me hubieras dicho siempre la verdad
Si hubieras respondido cuando te llamé
Si hubieras amado cuando te amé
Serías en mis sueños la mejor mujer
Si no supiste amar
Ahora te puedes marchar

Si tú supieras lo que yo sufrí por ti
Teniendo que olvidarte sin saber porqué
Y ahora me llamas, me quieres ver
Me juras que has cambiado y piensas en volver
Si no supiste amar
Ahora te puedes marchar
creator: Elchalix
